description: Anthropic Messages streaming where tool_use blocks may be pre-populated at message_start (programmatic tool calling). Validates that the stream still produces stable tool input/tool call parts.

source.notes: Replayed via FakeAnthropicClient; encoded as canonical AI SDK v3 JSONL via encodeV3StreamParts.

notes: Tool call inputs may appear fully formed (non-empty input) without streaming deltas.
